summary:

- mAP@50-95: 0.7153 (mAP across all IoU thresholds)

- Recall: 0.8971 (completeness of detections)

Final Loss: 0.9598
strengths: ✅ Excellent precision: mAP@50-95 = 0.7153 indicates strong overall detection accuracy

recommendations: ✨ Model shows good fit! Monitor validation metrics in future runs.
